svg.title: Platform system architecture — four layers: clients, gateway, services, data
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing institute dashboard, student portal, and mobile app connecting through an API gateway to four core services, which connect to three data stores and an AI module.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the institute dashboard work — what can admins do?')
sendPrompt('What does the student portal show — profile, scores, badges?')
sendPrompt('Should this platform have a mobile app — React Native or PWA?')
sendPrompt('What does the API gateway handle — rate limiting, auth, routing?')
g.text: FastAPI · JWT auth · rate limiting · request routing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Auth service handle — OAuth, JWT, institute SSO?')
sendPrompt('How does the competition engine work — timers, proctoring, scoring?')
sendPrompt('How does the gamification service compute XP, badges, streaks?')
sendPrompt('How does the payment service work — Razorpay, webhooks, plans?')
sendPrompt('What tables go in PostgreSQL for this platform — give me the full schema?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis store in this platform — leaderboards, sessions?')
sendPrompt('What goes in S3 — certificates, question images, exports?')

svg.text: Auto question generation from syllabus PDFs — FastAPI · FAISS · LLM · directly reuses your RAG project
